localInfo.publicTransport: Tren Ligero light rail to Estadio Azteca station; Metro Line 2 to Tasqueña.
localInfo.safetyTips: Use registered taxis or ride-hail apps; keep valuables out of sight on transit.

localInfo.attractions: Macroplaza, Fundidora Park, Santa Lucía Riverwalk.
localInfo.safetyTips: Summer heat can be intense; carry water.

localInfo.publicTransport: Mi Macro Periférico BRT plus matchday shuttles.
localInfo.attractions: Tlaquepaque, Hospicio Cabañas, Tequila day trips.
localInfo.safetyTips: Plan extra travel time on matchdays.

name: New York New Jersey Stadium (MetLife Stadium)

localInfo.publicTransport: NJ Transit rail to Meadowlands Sports Complex on event days.
localInfo.attractions: Manhattan sights, Liberty State Park, American Dream complex.
localInfo.safetyTips: Allow extra time for stadium security screening.

localInfo.publicTransport: Trinity Metro/DART connections plus event shuttles; rideshare zones available.
localInfo.attractions: Arlington Entertainment District, Dallas Arts District.
localInfo.safetyTips: Texas summer heat — hydrate before kickoff.

localInfo.publicTransport: RideKC buses and matchday express shuttles.
localInfo.attractions: National WWI Museum, Country Club Plaza, KC barbecue trail.
localInfo.safetyTips: Stadium is outside downtown — plan transport in advance.

localInfo.publicTransport: METRORail Red Line to Stadium Park/Astrodome.
localInfo.safetyTips: Roofed venue, but expect humidity outdoors.

localInfo.publicTransport: MARTA rail to GWCC/CNN Center or Vine City.
localInfo.attractions: Georgia Aquarium, Centennial Olympic Park, MLK National Historical Park.
localInfo.safetyTips: Downtown venue — walking access from many hotels.

localInfo.publicTransport: LA Metro K Line plus event shuttles from Downtown Inglewood.
localInfo.safetyTips: Book transport early — LA traffic peaks on matchdays.

localInfo.publicTransport: SEPTA Broad Street Line to NRG station.
localInfo.attractions: Independence Hall, Liberty Bell, Philadelphia Museum of Art.
localInfo.safetyTips: Sports complex area is well signposted from the subway.

localInfo.publicTransport: Link light rail to Stadium station.
localInfo.attractions: Pike Place Market, Space Needle, waterfront.
localInfo.safetyTips: Downtown venue — light rail is the easiest option.

name: San Francisco Bay Area Stadium (Levi's Stadium)

localInfo.nearestAirport: San José Mineta International (SJC) / San Francisco (SFO)
localInfo.publicTransport: VTA light rail to Great America station; Caltrain connections.
localInfo.attractions: San Francisco sights, Silicon Valley tech landmarks.
localInfo.safetyTips: Stadium is in Santa Clara, ~70 km from San Francisco — plan accordingly.

localInfo.publicTransport: MBTA event trains to Foxboro station on matchdays.
localInfo.attractions: Freedom Trail, Fenway area, Harvard/MIT campuses.
localInfo.safetyTips: Venue is ~45 km from Boston — check event train schedules.

localInfo.publicTransport: Matchday shuttles and rideshare; limited rail access.
localInfo.attractions: South Beach, Wynwood Walls, Everglades tours.
localInfo.safetyTips: Afternoon thunderstorms are common in summer.

localInfo.attractions: CN Tower, Distillery District, Toronto Islands.
localInfo.safetyTips: Exhibition Place fills quickly — arrive early.

localInfo.publicTransport: SkyTrain Expo Line to Stadium–Chinatown station.
localInfo.safetyTips: Downtown venue — walkable from most central hotels.
